summary: Added a global 'isImporting' state to the UI context and integrated it into project loading/importing workflows to show a loading overlay, providing visual feedback for long-running operations like unzipping or fetching large PDF blueprints.

plan.title: Update State Types
plan.description: Add 'isImporting' boolean to UIState and a corresponding 'SET_IMPORTING' action to EditorAction in client/src/lib/types.ts.

plan.title: Update Editor Context
plan.description: Initialize 'isImporting' in initialUIState and implement the 'SET_IMPORTING' case in editorReducer within client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx.

plan.title: Integrate Loading in useImport Hook
plan.description: Wrap all async import functions (ZIP, Directory, File) in useImport.ts with SET_IMPORTING dispatch calls to trigger the loading state during processing.

plan.title: Integrate Loading in PDFUploader
plan.description: Update handleOpenProject in PDFUploader.tsx to set isImporting during the fetch and processing of remote project files.

plan.title: Implement Loading UI
plan.description: Add a fixed loading overlay with a spinner and text to Home page and PDFUploader components to provide user feedback when isImporting is true.

acceptance_criteria.description: UIState in types.ts contains isImporting: boolean
EditorAction in types.ts includes { type: 'SET_IMPORTING'; payload: boolean }
editorReducer handles SET_IMPORTING by updating state.isImporting
handleZipImport in useImport.ts dispatches SET_IMPORTING true/false
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify try/finally blocks in handleZipImport in client/src/hooks/useImport.ts

acceptance_criteria.description: handleOpenProject in PDFUploader.tsx dispatches SET_IMPORTING true/false
acceptance_criteria.how_to_verify: Verify try/finally blocks in handleOpenProject in client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx

acceptance_criteria.description: Home component in home.tsx renders a loading overlay conditional on uiState.isImporting
PDFUploader component in PDFUploader.tsx renders a loading overlay conditional on uiState.isImporting

risks: Unintended UI flicker if isImporting is toggled too rapidly for small files
Nested loading state calls (e.g. handleFileImport calling handleZipImport) must ensure the final state is 'false'
